title: MyceliumFractalNet: Reaction-Diffusion Intelligence Engine with Causal Validation and TDA
description: Bio-inspired morphogenetic field intelligence engine combining reaction-diffusion PDE simulation, persistent homology (TDA), causal validation (46 rules), auto-heal with dopamine learning, and thermodynamic invariants. First system to unify R-D + TDA + causal pipeline in a single Python package.
